See how Ishbosheth was murdered! When those difficulties discourage us, which should spur our efforts, we betray both our heavenly rewards and our earthly lives. Do not love sleep, or you will come to poverty and ruin. An idle person is an easy target for the destroyer. We do not know when and where death will find us. When we lie down to sleep, we are not sure that we may not sleep the sleep of death before we awaken; nor do we know from what hand the fatal blow may come.

A person may be glad to obtain his rightful desires, and yet truly regret the means by which he receives them. He may feel sorrow for the death of a person by which he benefits. These men shed innocent blood, from the most shameful motives. David justly carried out vengeance upon them. He would not want to owe anything to anyone to help him through unlawful practices. God had helped him over many difficulties, and through many dangers, therefore he depended on Him to crown and complete His own work. He speaks of his rescue from all adversity as a completed thing; though he still faced many storms, he knew that the one who had delivered him would deliver him.
